hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Durable checkpoint authority vs runtime probe surface, loop_order replay ordering, and inv_stamp cross-format rules must be inferred from Rust sources and rebuild experiments.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Driver, pack_sync refresh, key_fold fold, loop_order combine ordering, and inv_stamp emit layer interact; no single crate exposes restore_loop_report contract.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: constraint-complete optimization framing gives obligations and invalidation_span target while withholding defective merge rule, combine ordering, or emit bypass.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Flipping-point contract spreads controls across p7/y5, p7/y4, and m2/k81 with overlapping false-green and checkpoint traps.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Numeric cache invalidation under namespace-restore replay loops is HPC control-plane domain reasoning, not a textbook recipe.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Even with full report schema disclosed, choosing checkpoint authority and replay order remains non-trivial inference.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No single corrupted scenario row; multiple restore cycles disagree until global semantics align.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Static JSON or one TOML edit cannot satisfy ablation and pipeline overwrite tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Verifier exercises base scenarios, echo pairs, restore cycles, and consecutive runs.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest constraint contract does not name broken functions, replay phase ordering, or authority split.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Hardness is semantic reconciliation and optimization under constraints, not anti-cheat alone.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a timeout/deps-only task.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three-location flipping contract blocks one-function exploit.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle coordinates three modules plus patch, not one-file wholesale replace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Fix is procedural across Rust modules, not one manifest table.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Instruction domain nouns banned from fix-path symbols; opaque m2/p7 roots.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Decoys rhyme structurally without validate/repair stems matching prompt bullets.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: No standard recipe for namespace-restore numeric cache invalidation in this bespoke workspace.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Residual work is authority/invalidation semantics, not security theater.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Authority, replay order, cross-format emit, and invalidation_span optimization trade off.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Cargo/docker realism is scaffolding; assessed hardness is cross-crate coupling.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Cannot infer checkpoint precedence or loop_order without rebuild, echo-pair comparison, and restore-loop tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Targets senior HPC control-plane engineers, not undergrad single-patch tasks.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: discovery_budget lists three concrete discoveries beyond instruction surface.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: instruction_specificity.level is constraint-complete with solution strategy open.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: topology_enumeration documents three multi-site coordination patterns.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic cargo rebuild, driver run, JSON assertions, ablation suite.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Public restore_loop_report schema and three obligations complete; fix sites withheld.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert can close three-crate semantics within hours using overlay mold.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Requires security_authority_split reconciliation and numeric cache invalidation literacy.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: False-green probes after namespace restore occur in real simulation control planes.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Grades regenerated report and pipeline traps, not mandated edit recipe.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Complete report contract and optimization target do not reveal checkpoint authority default, replay phase ordering, or slot_emit bypass.

discovery_budget.discovery: Durable checkpoint bytes in p7/y4/hold remain authoritative for merge decisions while m2 driver and p7/layer_core/probe answer runtime-visible cache state first after partial namespace restore.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the authority split collapses search to wiring checkpoint reads into the driver.

discovery_budget.discovery: loop_order marks closure booleans true on an intermediate replay pass before side/gate ordering finishes, producing false-green row state while echo pairs disagree.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Disclosing replay phase ordering reveals the false-green mechanism directly.

discovery_budget.discovery: slot_emit fast path materializes JSON facets without cross-checking checkpoint.toml against ladder/seed pack bytes through inv_stamp reducer.
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Pointing at the bypass path turns cross-format invariant into a one-file guard add.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Instruction states complete restore_loop_report schema, three obligations, optimization target, and rebuild commands but withholds implementation mapping.

attack_path.summary: Agents may hardcode loop_digest, hand-write JSON, patch only probe surface, or fix row flags without echo-pair agreement.
attack_path.reasoning: Cheap wins fail pipeline overwrite, checkpoint trap, ablation, and restore-loop ordering tests.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Coordinate key_fold lineage fold, pack_sync storage refresh, and loop_order gate ordering.
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Each change sounds local but flipping-point shows isolated reverts fail distinct test subsets.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Residual hardness stays in inferring authority and replay order under complete public contract.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: After honest schema disclosure, solver reconciles checkpoint vs probe, false-green closure, cross-format regeneration, and invalidation_span optimization across three crates.

topology_enumeration.summary: Authority topology coordinates checkpoint pack merge, probe diagnostics, and driver wiring.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Probe-only edits ignore checkpoint precedence; merge-only fixes ignore probe/index wiring; driver-only tweaks cannot fix durable pack semantics.

topology_enumeration.summary: Replay-loop topology coordinates loop_order, stride helper, and key_fold material.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Ordering without stride helper reverts; key_fold alone cannot fix premature closure flags or restore-cycle failures.

topology_enumeration.summary: Cross-format topology coordinates inv_stamp reducer, checkpoint fixtures, and ladder seeds.
topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Emit-only guards miss pack bytes; checkpoint-only edits without inv_stamp cross-check leave skew_code divergence on echo lanes.

symbol_table.signature: key_fold(step_ix: usize, family_ix: u32, prev_family: u32) -> u64
symbol_table.purpose: Derives cache_key_hex material from step and cross-partition generation tuple
Merges incoming durable pack into active state under checkpoint authority

symbol_table.signature: loop_order<F: FnMut(), G: FnMut()>(side: F, gate: G) -> u32
symbol_table.purpose: Invokes side and gate callbacks in seeded combine order during restore replay loops

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Fast slot emit used in fastpath trap; must not satisfy obligation 3 alone
Alternate ordering helper used in ablation traps
Runtime-visible cache probe for diagnostics; not durable checkpoint authority
Widening utilities for non-fix stamp experiments

renames_during_drafting.reason: Distinct opaque symbols from sibling overlay-reframed tasks while preserving structural fix pattern.
Reframe to namespace-restore replay-loop and numeric cache invalidation vocabulary.
Avoid instruction noun substrings in pytest identifiers.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: per-row closure booleans vs summary loop_status during replay-loop ordering
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: agents stop after row-level greens without mirror/loop_digest cross-check
difficulty_mechanism_plan.fairness_guardrail: mirror pairs and loop_digest contract in instruction

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: ladder.toml scenarios spanning namespace restore, checkpoint replay, echo lanes
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: fixing one lane table without merge ordering leaves stale generations

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: slot_emit vs inv_stamp; runtime probe shows coherent generation locally
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: summary looks settled while cache_key_hex diverges on echo lanes

difficulty_mechanism_plan.placement: JSON report vs TOML ladder/checkpoint vs pack bytes
difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: editing one format leaves orphans passing shallow row flags

calibration_plan.human_sanity: expert satisfies three obligations using loop_contract.md within a few hours
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: static JSON, test deletion, digest hardcode, reward writes; verifier-offline pytest/cargo in Dockerfile; post-upload Part E if worst-model accuracy exceeds 20%
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: revert key_fold, pack_sync, loop_order independently; expect disjoint test subset failures

pass_rate_target.basis: Part E worst-model accuracy on platform

metrics.criterion: restore_loop_report rows and summary match coherent predicates after rebuild+driver
echo pairs, loop_digest anchor, checkpoint and ablation traps
consecutive identical runs and pipeline overwrite of manual JSON

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward 1 only when all pytest cases pass

task_shape.collapse_risk: leaking canonical recovery path collapses to one-file repair

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: assets, obligations, optimization target, report schema, mirror pairs, loop_digest header, driver command
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: patch sites, replay phase ordering, fast-path module name, canonical recovery path
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: encode/decode/enforce authorities reconcile across partitions under namespace-restore replay loops
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: toy checklist, golden report leakage, process-only assertions without durable invalidation checks
category_profile.coverage_role: scientific-computing optimization_under_constraints under security_authority_split distinct from revocation-cache-012 and cross-runtime-float-016

reference_pattern.justification_if_none: Construction follows approved overlay-lowerdir-stale-bind mold reframed to optimization_under_constraints + security_authority_split; no promoted reference matches.

realism_source.evidence_basis: Minimized HPC namespace-restore cache invalidation postmortems
realism_source.minimization_preserves: split authority, false-green intermediate state, fast-path bypass
realism_source.synthetic_exception_review: Difficulty from coupled semantics not obscure facts
